description: Cross-sector baseline compliance controls for Nigeria v1. This pack is designed to be applied together with sector-specific overlays. Rules are evidence-driven and deterministic; absence of evidence does not by itself constitute legal non-compliance.

metadata.scope: Nigeria-only baseline controls for document/document-set review.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Nigerian legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37
Nigeria Data Protection Act, 2023
primary_sources.issuer: Federal Republic of Nigeria / Nigeria Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Nigeria Data Protection Act General Application and Implementation Directive, 2025
Nigeria Data Protection Regulation, 2019 and Implementation Framework
Cybercrimes (Prohibition, Prevention, etc.) Act, 2015 as amended 2024
Federal Competition and Consumer Protection Act, 2018
CBN AML/CFT/CPF supervisory resources
used_for: baseline AML/KYC evidence routing where applicable

rules.title: Privacy notice or privacy policy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document contains a privacy notice, privacy policy, or equivalent personal-data disclosure evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Personal-data processing purpose and lawful-basis evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document explains why personal data is processed and gives a lawful basis or consent/legitimate-interest basis.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Data-subject rights and grievance channel evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for evidence of data-subject rights, complaint/grievance channels, or rights-request handling.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Data Protection Officer or privacy contact evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for a named or functional DPO/privacy contact, privacy office, or data-protection contact point.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Data security safeguard evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for data-security safeguards relevant to personal-data protection.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Third-party processor or data-sharing control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether third-party sharing, processor contracts, vendor obligations, or confidentiality controls are addressed.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Constitution of the Federal Republic of Nigeria 1999, Section 37

rules.title: Retention, deletion, or disposal evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document defines retention, deletion, disposal, or retention-period controls for information/personal data.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.summary: Checks for safeguards around international or cross-border personal-data transfer when such transfers are referenced.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Licensing, authorization, or permit evidence is present where regulated activity is referenced
rules.summary: Checks for licence/license, authorization, permit, approval, or regulator-issued authority evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.

rules.title: Corporate registration or statutory identity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for registration/incorporation identifiers such as CAC, RC number, incorporation, registration certificate, or statutory identity.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/KYC control evidence is present where financial crime risk is relevant
rules.summary: Checks for AML, CFT, CPF, KYC, customer due diligence, transaction monitoring, or suspicious-activity escalation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.

rules.title: Sector regulator or rule-source evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document references regulator-issued rules, directives, circulars, guidelines, standards, approvals, or supervisory obligations.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Governance ownership or approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ownership, approval, accountability, board/management sign-off, policy owner, or responsible officer evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Public-sector access-to-information evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for access-to-information, public-record, disclosure, response-time, or information-request process evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required.
metadata.review_guidance: A human reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Freedom of Information/access-to-information workflow where applicable; public-sector overlays should refine this rule
